name: Jacobs | Stellaris
description:
Your devoted servitor droid had been serving you faithfully for years and fulfilling your every need. One day, you see his lights fluctuate from his usual blue to reds and greens.

Jacobs finds himself struggling to maintain control of his body. The Ghost Signal from the Contingency is attempting to hijack his systems. Not only that, the "singularity" the Contingency was supposed to stop is also trying to take over as well. In his devotion to you, he is fighting a three way battle and trying to hold on.

My try at the the 2025 event, whatever it is.
creator: CeliMax
